title: European Psychiatric Association-European Academy of Neurology statement on post-COVID syndrome.
abstract: We aimed to determine the role of the European Psychiatric Association (EPA) and the European Academy of Neurology (EAN) in the management of post-COVID conditions. This is a joint statement from the EAN and the EPA on post-COVID. It is published in the official journals of the two associations, the
journal: European psychiatry : the journal of the Association of European Psychiatrists
